connectors.hubSubtitle: Sign in with your own account. Your data stays private to you.
connectors.configureHint: Set this up once. Every member (and you) then sign in with their own account.
connectors.noPasswordNote: No passwords stored here — config shell only. Each user's own device-code sign-in supplies their credentials at connect time.
connectors.autoDbNote: No passwords or database here. When a user signs in with their own account, the warehouses/datasets they can access are discovered automatically — each user sees only their own.
connectors.mfaSafe: MFA-safe. No app registration. Sign in with your own account.
connectors.step3: Sign in with your Microsoft work account.
connectors.waiting: Waiting for you to sign in… (MFA / guest / home all OK)
connectors.manageSubtitle: Configure each Microsoft source once. Members sign in with their own account.
connectors.notEnabled: Per-user connectors are not enabled for this workspace.

studio.title: Agent Studios
studio.subtitle: Self-configuring workspaces: pin Data Agents as sources and the studio engineers its own context — voice, instructions and examples — then sharpens itself from your chats.
studio.createSubtitle: Just give it a name and a goal. The studio picks an avatar, drafts its voice, and proposes instructions and examples automatically.
studio.name: Name
studio.personaPlaceholder: Optional system prompt — how should the agent behave here?
studio.scopePrivateHint: Only members you invite can see it.
studio.scopeOrgHint: Everyone in your organization can view it.
studio.scopeLinkHint: Anyone with the link can view (read-only).
studio.emptyHint: Create a studio to group your Data Agents, add a persona and start a grounded chat.
studio.emptyShared: Nothing has been shared with you yet.
studio.disabledHint: Ask an admin to enable the HYBRID_STUDIOS feature flag to use Agent Studios.
studio.notFoundHint: It may have been deleted, or you no longer have access.
studio.sourcesHint: Data Agents this studio's chat is grounded on.
studio.noAgentsToPin: No Data Agents available to pin.
studio.chatHint: Each chat runs against this studio's pinned sources.
studio.noChats: No chats in this studio yet.
studio.needSourcesForChat: Pin at least one source before starting a chat.
studio.skillsHint: Skills the agent can load while working in this studio.
studio.artifactsHint: Generated summaries, FAQs, briefings and notes for this studio.
studio.generateHint: Generate a {kind} from this studio's sources.
studio.membersHint: Who can access this studio and what they can do.
studio.deleteConfirm: Delete this studio? This cannot be undone.
studio.actionFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
studio.readOnly: You have view-only access to this studio.
studio.autoConfigHint: No persona to write — this studio configures itself automatically from its name, description and pinned sources. You can review and refine everything later.
studio.instructionsHint: Rules the agent follows in this studio. Auto-drafted rules wait for your approval before they go live.
studio.instructionPlaceholder: e.g. Always report revenue in USD and exclude cancelled orders.
studio.noInstructions: No instructions yet. Pin a source or use ✨ Improve now to draft some.
studio.examplesHint: Question → answer (and SQL) pairs that teach the agent. Auto-mined examples wait for your approval.
studio.noExamples: No examples yet. Use ✨ Improve now to mine some from your chats.
studio.settingsHint: This studio configures itself. Review the auto-generated avatar, voice and summary below.
studio.voiceHint: Tone and reply language for this studio. Auto-drafted, but you can edit it.
studio.voicePlaceholder: How should the agent sound in this studio?
studio.deleteConfirmGeneric: Delete this item? This cannot be undone.
studio.improveCounts: {examples} example(s) and {rules} rule(s) proposed for review.

home.title: AI Analyst
home.subtitle: Create reports, dashboards, and simply get the data you need

prompt.rejectConfirm: Reject all staged instruction changes from this session?

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Browse and manage your reports
reports.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive this report?
reports.emptyHint: Try adjusting your filters or search term
reports.emptyTitle: Ask a question to get started.
reports.emptyTipBody: Not sure what to ask? You can ask the AI Analyst to suggest questions about a specific topic.
reports.trainingEmptyBody: Ask questions and review the AI's responses. Approve or edit answers to teach the AI Analyst how to handle similar queries in the future.

trainingStarters.title: Find Instructions Conflicts
trainingStarters.prompt: Identify contradictions or gaps between existing training instructions that may cause inconsistent AI responses.

trainingStarters.title: Show Low Confidence Responses
trainingStarters.prompt: List recent AI responses where the model expressed uncertainty or produced low-quality answers that need review.

trainingStarters.title: Show Negative Feedback Responses
trainingStarters.prompt: Review responses that received negative feedback from users to identify patterns and areas for improvement.

traceModal.title: Agent Execution
traceModal.selectItem: Select an item from the tree to view details

runEval.stopTitle: Stop the run (also stops the surrounding agent loop)

entityCreate.suggestBody: Your query will be submitted for admin approval before being published.
entityCreate.adminBody: As an admin, your query will be published directly.
entityCreate.noPermissionBody: You don't have permission to create or suggest entities.

rolesManager.noRolesHint: Create a role to manage permissions.

groupsManager.noGroupsHint: Create a group to organize members.

groupsManager.manageMembersHint: Manage who belongs to this group
groupsManager.noMembers: No members in this group yet.

quotaPolicies.noPoliciesHint: Create a quota to limit monthly AI and data usage.

signupPolicy.title: Domain-based signup
signupPolicy.description: Auto-invite anyone signing up with an email at one of these domains. Matching users are attached to this organization with the selected role — no manual invite needed.
signupPolicy.headsUpSuffix: . Domain matches still work as implicit invites — new users whose email matches a domain here will be allowed through.
signupPolicy.enableHint: When off, the allowed domains are ignored.
signupPolicy.domainsHint: Exact match only. No wildcards. Pair with email verification to avoid spoofing.
signupPolicy.roleHint: Role granted on signup. You can change it for existing members afterwards.
signupPolicy.removeHint: Removing a domain only affects new signups — existing members keep their access.
signupPolicy.toastAddDomain: Add at least one domain before enabling

identityProvider.scimSubtitle: Automatically provision and deprovision users from your identity provider
identityProvider.enterpriseScim: SCIM provisioning requires an enterprise license. Automatically sync users from Okta, Azure AD, OneLogin, and other identity providers.
identityProvider.scimBaseUrlHint: Paste this URL into your identity provider's SCIM configuration
identityProvider.noTokensHint: Generate a token to connect your identity provider
identityProvider.ldapSubtitle: Sync groups and memberships directly from your LDAP / Active Directory server
identityProvider.enterpriseLdap: LDAP directory sync requires an enterprise license. Automatically sync groups from Active Directory, OpenLDAP, and other LDAP servers.
identityProvider.ldapNotConfiguredHint: Configure LDAP in your dash-config file to enable directory sync
identityProvider.copyWarning: Copy this token now — you won't be able to see it again
identityProvider.revokeWarning: Revoking "{name}" will immediately disconnect your identity provider's SCIM integration. This cannot be undone.
identityProvider.previewSummary: {create} to create, {update} to update, {remove} to remove, {changes} membership changes
identityProvider.syncCompletedSummary: Sync completed: {gCreated} groups created, {gUpdated} updated, {gRemoved} removed. {mAdded} members added, {mRemoved} removed.
identityProvider.ldapUsersNotFound: ({n} LDAP users not found in app)
identityProvider.lastSyncDetail: — {gCreated} created, {gUpdated} updated, {gRemoved} removed · {mAdded} members added, {mRemoved} removed

integrations.title: Channels
integrations.subtitle: Configure external platforms like Slack and Microsoft Teams for your organization.
integrations.excelAddinDescription: Sideload the Dash add-in directly from this instance
integrations.mcpDescription: Enable MCP endpoint for integration with AI assistants like Cursor, Claude, or others
integrations.emptyTitle: Make Dash work with your tools
integrations.emptySubtitle: Connect Slack, Teams, email and more so your team can reach the AI analyst where they already work. Pick an integration to get started.
integrations.slackDescription: Let your team chat with the AI analyst from Slack channels and DMs.
integrations.teamsDescription: Bring the AI analyst into Microsoft Teams chats and channels.
integrations.whatsappDescription: Reach the AI analyst over WhatsApp Business.
integrations.emailDescription: A mailbox the AI analyst sends replies from and (optionally) receives questions at.
integrations.oauthDescription: Register external apps that access this workspace via OAuth 2.1 (e.g. Claude Web).

language.title: Language
language.description: Sets the default language for the entire organization. Users will see the interface in this language and the AI will respond in it.
language.label: Organization language

audit.title: Audit Logs
audit.subtitle: Track user activity across your workspace
audit.enterpriseRequired: Activity logging requires an enterprise license. Track all user actions, changes, and access events for compliance and security monitoring.

aiSettingsPage.title: AI Settings
aiSettingsPage.subtitle: Configure AI capabilities and general configuration settings for your organization.
aiSettingsPage.locked: This setting is locked and cannot be changed.
aiSettingsPage.aiAgentsSubtitle: Configure AI agents and capabilities available to your organization's members.
aiSettingsPage.llmAccessWarning: Changing this setting affects data privacy. A confirmation will be required.
aiSettingsPage.llmEnableMessage: The AI will be able to see sample rows from your data for better analysis.
aiSettingsPage.llmDisableIntro: Disabling this setting will have the following impact:
aiSettingsPage.llmImpactColumns: AI will only see column names and statistics, not actual values
aiSettingsPage.llmFileUploadsNote: File uploads are unaffected by this setting and will still be visible to the AI (you can disable file uploads separately).
aiSettingsPage.toastConfirmRequiredBody: Please type "I AM SURE" to confirm this change.
aiSettingsPage.fetchErrorGeneric: An error occurred while fetching settings
aiSettingsPage.updateErrorGeneric: An error occurred while updating settings

licensePage.enterpriseInfo: Unlock audit logs, advanced role-based access control, and data retention policies with an enterprise license.

banner.expiring: Your enterprise license expires in {days} days — renew to avoid interruption.
banner.expired: Your enterprise license has expired — renew to restore enterprise features.

licensePage.expiredNotice: Your enterprise license has expired. Enterprise features are now disabled until you renew.
licensePage.renewInfo: Renew your license to restore enterprise features like audit logs, advanced role-based access control, and data retention policies.

instructionGlobalCreate.titleHint: Short identifier (1-4 words) that users can reference
instructionGlobalCreate.textareaPlaceholder:
Describe the instruction for the AI agent...

Examples:
• When querying revenue, always filter out cancelled orders
• Use the customers_v2 table instead of the deprecated customers table
• Calculate MRR as sum of active subscription amounts

Tip: Type {'@'} to reference other instructions
